title: Reuben Kaye: The Butch is Back
full_description: An autobiographical cabaret exploring Kaye's origins as a young, queer boy in Melbourne as he processes his fraught relationship with his father — equal parts introspective and explosive. Song, stand-up and incredible bitchiness, backed by a full band. Winner of Best Cabaret Show at the Off West End Awards 2023. The second-highest reviewed show at Edinburgh Fringe 2023.
ai_summary: Reuben Kaye's award-winning autobiographical cabaret — backed by a full band — explores his queer upbringing in Melbourne and his complex relationship with his father with the kind of explosive wit that earned it Best Cabaret at the Off West End Awards.
